FEAX · GPU Solver Benchmark

Linear-elasticity solver scaling across NVIDIA GPUs

A fixed cantilever refined from 48k to 1M DOF (HEX8, float64), solved three ways — cuDSS direct, AMG-preconditioned CG, and matrix-free Krylov CG — in eager, JIT, and batched (vmap) modes. Pick a device and metric to compare.

Each point is the mean of 5 timed repeats (2 warm-up), float64. Time per solve is batch-amortized (vmap batch=10 divided by 10); throughput counts the whole batch; compile is the one-time JIT/XLA trace+compile (eager has none). vmap variants: vmap·lhs batches the material — the left-hand-side matrix A varies, so B factorizations; vmap·rhs batches the load — the right-hand side b varies with A fixed (factor-once / solve-many). Data: bench.csv.
